channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran's huge Gulf gas field is struck in major escalation
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran targets Gulf energy sites after gas field strike
- For Iranians, Bombing of Gas Field Worsens Already Dire Energy Crisis
- Strikes Deliver Another Blow to Iran’s Domestic Energy Sites
- Strikes Deliver Another Blow to Iran’s Domestic Energy Sites
- UAE warns targeting Iranian energy facilities is “dangerous escalation”
- Iran threatens energy targets throughout Gulf, after huge Pars gas field is struck
- Reported attack hits South Pars natural gas field, an energy lifeline for Iran
- Tehran warns Gulf energy sites to evacuate after Iranian gas facilities hit
- Reported attack hits South Pars natural gas field, an energy lifeline for Iran
- Oil Prices Jump Following Attack on Iranian Gas Field
- Iran names oil and gas sites in Gulf states as potential targets
- Iran warns Gulf nations of major response after gas field strike
- Iran Threatens Gulf States’ Oil and Gas Sites After Strike on World’s Largest Field
- Iran threatens Gulf energy targets after Pars gas field struck, sending oil prices higher
- Oil Prices Jump Following Attack on Iranian Gas Field
- Iran threatens to strike Gulf energy facilities after South Pars attack
- Iran threatens to strike Gulf energy facilities after South Pars attack
- Iran's IRGC Navy chief threatens retaliatory strikes on oil facilities across Gulf
- Tehran warns Gulf energy installations after oil industry facilities hit in southern Iran
- Tehran warns Gulf energy installations after oil industry facilities hit in southern Iran
- Iran vows to retaliate against Gulf energy sites after largest gasfield hit
- Iran says will target energy facilities across Gulf after attack on its gas field, lists 5 locations
- Israeli air force hits Iranian gas infrastructure
- Iran tells Saudi Arabia, Qatar and UAE to evacuate energy facilities after Israel hits gas plant
- Urgent: Israeli army strikes major Iranian natural gas facility in Bushehr -- media
- Iranian state media say natural gas facilities associated with offshore South Pars field attacked, without elaborating
- Strikes hit Iran’s South Pars oil and petrochemical facilities]]>
